name: nemo-relay-plugin
description: Native Relay gateway lifecycle and Codex hooks for complete local observability.

interface.shortDescription: Run the native Relay gateway and capture Codex lifecycle events.
interface.longDescription: Starts the native nemo-relay gateway through a required lifecycle-bound MCP server, routes model traffic through it, and installs command hooks that preserve canonical Codex lifecycle payloads.
defaultPrompt: Capture this Codex session with NeMo Relay observability.
